faqs.question: Why is mosquito control especially important in Perth Amboy?
faqs.answer: Perth Amboy's location on the Raritan Bay and Arthur Kill creates abundant mosquito breeding sites due to tidal marshes, standing water, and humid coastal conditions. Professional mosquito control protects residents from diseases like West Nile virus and EEE while allowing you to enjoy outdoor spaces near the waterfront and local parks.
